decision-tree.root-question: Is a built-in admin/CMS panel a hard requirement OR is the project a templated full-stack web app?

branch.conclusion: Django. Load downstream: django-models, django-base-model, django-api, django-coding-standards, django-pytest.

branch.question: Is the workload high-concurrency I/O-bound async (WebSocket fanout, streaming, ML inference) OR is auto OpenAPI / Pydantic validation a hard requirement?

branch.conclusion: FastAPI. Load downstream: python-fastapi, python-async, python-typing.

branch.question: Is the surface small (single feature, <500 LOC expected, short lifetime, no team scale)?

branch.conclusion: Default to Django for non-trivial non-async sync apps — batteries-included beats hand-assembling Flask extensions at scale.

example.p: Input: B2B SaaS with editor admin, role-gated permissions → admin_needed=true → Django. Confidence high; no further questions.
